Package com.mohanad.edufinance.model

Class Student

java.lang.Object
com.mohanad.edufinance.model.Person
com.mohanad.edufinance.model.Student
public class Student extends Person
Concrete class representing a Student in the system. Inherits common attributes from the Person class, demonstrating Inheritance.
Author:
MOHANAD

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Student()
    Default constructor.
    Student(int id, String name, int gradeId, double paidAmount)
    Parameterized constructor to create a Student with ID, name, grade, and paid amount.

  • Constructor Details

    • Student

      public Student()
      Default constructor.

    • Student

      public Student(int id, String name, int gradeId, double paidAmount)
      Parameterized constructor to create a Student with ID, name, grade, and paid amount.
      Parameters:
      id - The student's unique ID
      name - The student's name
      gradeId - The ID of the grade/class the student is enrolled in
      paidAmount - The total amount already paid by the student

    • getGradeId

      Gets the ID of the grade the student belongs to.
